message:
test(frankenterm-web): add golden fixture test for glyph atlas placement stability

Add golden_fixture_placement_and_dirty_rects_are_stable test that inserts
glyphs ('A', 'B', 'C') with known raster sizes into a GlyphAtlasCache
and asserts deterministic atlas coordinates (with +2 padding) across runs.

Also register proptest_mermaid_parser_invariants integration test binary
with required-features = ["diagram"] in ftui-extras Cargo.toml.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
